name: RD-03D mmWave Radar
description: The `rd03d` component allows you to use the Ai-Thinker RD-03D 24GHz millimeter-wave radar module with ESPHome for multi-target trajectory tracking.

config_entries.label: UART ID
config_entries.description: Manually specify the ID of the [UART Component](https://esphome.io/components/uart) to use. Required if you have multiple UARTs configured.

config_entries.label: ID
config_entries.description: Manually specify the ID for this component.

config_entries.label: Throttle
config_entries.description: Minimum time between sensor updates. The radar sends data very frequently; use this to reduce the update rate sent to Home Assistant. For example, ``500ms`` or ``1s``.

config_entries.label: Tracking Mode
config_entries.description: The tracking mode to configure. If not specified, no command is sent and the radar uses its default mode (typically multi-target). Requires a TX pin to be configured.
